API docs by Redocly

Apen API (v1)

Download OpenAPI specification:

This service provides a community platform for doctors

admin

Get admins

Retrieve list of admin users

Authorizations:
None

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/admins

  • 500
Content type
application/json
[

      • null
      ],
    • "specialty_badge": "string",
    • "superlikes": 0,
    • "user_id": "string",
    • "username": "string"
    }
]

required
post_ids

string

Pass character user

Approve a user's character status

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

User ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Character pass parameters

department
string
position
string (models.Position)
Enum: "VS" "Resident" "PGY"
realname
required
string non-empty
Array of objects (models.SpecialtyBadgeParam)

Responses

      • "badge": "none",

      }
    ]
}

Review clinic application

Review and approve/reject a clinic application

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
id
required
string

Application ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Review decision

clinic_name
string non-empty
county_or_city
string non-empty
realname
string
status
string (models.ReviewStatus)
Enum: "inreview" "passed" "passed_with_expired" "rejected" "pending"

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/admins.clinic_applications/{id}

Content type
application/json

}

None

required

name
string
photo_url
string

}

None
path Parameters
id

string

required

string

integer

Create official post

Create an official post with media files and optional poll

Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
files
required
string <binary>

Media files to upload

thumbnails
string <binary>

Thumbnail images for videos

department_tags
Array of strings

Department tags

poll_options
Array of strings

Poll options

poll_duration
integer

Poll duration in seconds

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/admins.official_post

Pass user v2

Approve a user registration application

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

User ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Pass user parameters

character
required
string (models.Character)
Enum: "doctor" "student" "vendor"
day
integer
department
string
features
Array of strings (models.FeatureType)
Items Enum: "legacy_vendor" "hire"
position
string (models.Position)
Enum: "VS" "Resident" "PGY"
realname
string
Array of objects (models.SpecialtyBadgeParam)

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/admins.pass.v2/{user_id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "character": "doctor",
  • "day": 0,
  • "department": "string",
  • "features": [
    • "legacy_vendor"
    ],
  • "position": "VS",
  • "realname": "string",
  • "specialties": [
    • {
      • "badge": "none",
      • "specialty": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Review specialty application

None
path Parameters
id
required
string

Application ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Review decision

facility
string
facility_code
string
position
string (models.Position)
Enum: "VS" "Resident" "PGY"
realname
string non-empty
Array of objects (models.SpecialtyBadgeParam)
status
string
Enum: "inreview" "passed" "passed_with_expired" "rejected" "pending"

Authorizations:
Bearer
path Parameters
thread_id
required
string

Thread ID

query Parameters
next
string

Next page token (ID of last message in previous page)

count
integer

Number of messages to return (default 20, max 100)

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/ai/gpt/threads/{thread_id}/messages

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "content": "string",
      • "feedback": "string",
      • "has_results": true,
      • "id": "string",
      • "references": [
        • {
          • "content": "This is the content of the referenced post...",
          • "id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
          • "post": { },
          • "product_name_en": "Product Name",
          • "product_name_zh": "产品名称",
          • "title": "Example Post Title",
          • "type": "post",
          • "url": "apen://posts/123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000"
          }
        ],
      • "role": "string",
      • "workflow_steps": [
        • {
          • "display_name": "string",
          • "id": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "next": "string"
}

Stream chat response

Send a message and stream the AI response as SSE events. Returns a sequence of events in SSE format.

Event Flow:

  1. start - Stream initialization
  2. workflow_step - Processing steps (multiple events showing AI workflow progress)
  3. text_delta - Incremental response text (multiple events building the final response)
  4. references - Source references with A-Pen post data
  5. finish - Complete conversation with full messages, workflow_steps, and references
  6. done - Stream completion
  7. error - Error events (if workflow fails)

Detailed Event Examples:

1. Start Event: {"event":"start","data":{}}

2. Workflow Step Events (multiple): {"event":"workflow_step","data":{"id":"query-insite-step","display_name":"檢索 A-Pen 中關於美食推薦的社群內容..."}} {"event":"workflow_step","data":{"id":"query-lecture-step","display_name":"檢索 A-Pen 中關於美食推薦的講座內容..."}} {"event":"workflow_step","data":{"id":"summary-step","display_name":"正在彙整資訊中..."}} {"event":"workflow_step","data":{"id":"query-drug-step","display_name":"查詢關於美食推薦的藥品交互作用與仿單資訊..."}}

3. Text Delta Events (multiple, building response incrementally): {"event":"text_delta","data":{"text":"根據社群討論，針對不同地區與預算的美食推薦如下："}} {"event":"text_delta","data":{"text":"\n\n**1. 台北高級餐廳（人均預算約 2000-3000"}} {"event":"text_delta","data":{"text":" 元）**\n* **牛排與西式料理**：史密斯華倫斯基牛排館"}}

4. References Event: {"event":"references","data":[{"type":"post","id":"1360f514-8baf-4a33-9148-b6a22bc3fff9","title":"史密斯華倫斯基牛排館訂位","content":"有沒有什麼方法\n可以訂到12/16星期六晚上\n史密斯華倫斯基牛排館\n打電話去問說客滿了！","url":"apen://posts/1360f514-8baf-4a33-9148-b6a22bc3fff9","post":{"id":"1360f514-8baf-4a33-9148-b6a22bc3fff9","author":{"id":"author123","name":"美食愛好者"},"category":"餐廳推薦","created_at":"2024-12-10T15:30:00Z","content":"有沒有什麼方法\n可以訂到12/16星期六晚上\n史密斯華倫斯基牛排館\n打電話去問說客滿了！","likes_count":15,"comments_count":8}},{"type":"post","id":"78be7d77-9b98-4925-a2f5-652442281487","title":"台北信義高級餐廳推薦","content":"求推薦台北信義一帶中高級餐廳\n約會用\n不吃牛肉\n一人2000~3000左右","url":"apen://posts/78be7d77-9b98-4925-a2f5-652442281487","post":{"id":"78be7d77-9b98-4925-a2f5-652442281487","author":{"id":"author456","name":"約會專家"},"category":"餐廳推薦","created_at":"2024-12-08T12:45:00Z","content":"求推薦台北信義一帶中高級餐廳\n約會用\n不吃牛肉\n一人2000~3000左右","likes_count":23,"comments_count":12}}]}

5. Finish Event: {"event":"finish","data":[{"id":"msg123","role":"user","content":"推薦一些台北的美食餐廳"},{"id":"msg456","role":"assistant","content":"根據社群討論，針對不同地區與預算的美食推薦如下：\n\n**1. 台北高級餐廳（人均預算約 2000-3000 元）**\n* **牛排與西式料理**：史密斯華倫斯基牛排館、馨亞法式小酒館、月湖歐式餐廳（來源：A-Pen 社群討論）。","feedback":"none","workflow_steps":[{"id":"query-insite-step","display_name":"檢索 A-Pen 中關於美食推薦的社群內容..."},{"id":"query-lecture-step","display_name":"檢索 A-Pen 中關於美食推薦的講座內容..."},{"id":"summary-step","display_name":"正在彙整資訊中..."}],"references":[{"type":"post","id":"1360f514-8baf-4a33-9148-b6a22bc3fff9","title":"史密斯華倫斯基牛排館訂位","content":"有沒有什麼方法\n可以訂到12/16星期六晚上\n史密斯華倫斯基牛排館","url":"apen://posts/1360f514-8baf-4a33-9148-b6a22bc3fff9","post":{"id":"1360f514-8baf-4a33-9148-b6a22bc3fff9","author":{"id":"author123","name":"美食愛好者"},"category":"餐廳推薦","created_at":"2024-12-10T15:30:00Z","content":"有沒有什麼方法\n可以訂到12/16星期六晚上\n史密斯華倫斯基牛排館\n打電話去問說客滿了！","likes_count":15,"comments_count":8}}]}]}

6. Done Event: {"event":"done","data":{}}

Authorizations:

path Parameters
thread_id
required
string

required

required
string
thread_id
string

ThreadID now comes from URL path parameter, not required in JSON

auth

Bind an email to an existing account

This API binds an email address to an existing third-party login account by verifying the 6-digit code sent to the email

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

email and verification code

code
required
string

6-digit verification code

email
required
string <email>

email address to bind

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/auth/bind

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "123456",
  • "email": "yorkchou@gmail.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Send email verification code

Sends a 6-digit code to the given email and returns a short-lived JWT (10 min) for /auth/code/verify. type: 0=signup, 1=bind, 2=reset, 3=login. type=0 (signup): email must NOT be registered, returns 403 if exists. type=1 (bind): email must NOT be registered or bound, returns 403 if exists. type=2 (reset): email must be registered, returns 404 if not found. type=3 (login): email must be registered, returns 404 if not found.

Request Body schema: application/json
required

email and type

email
required
string <email>

target email address

type
integer [ 0 .. 3 ]
Enum: 0 1 2 3

0=signup, 1=bind, 2=reset, 3=login

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/auth/code/send

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "yorkchou@gmail.com",
  • "type": 0
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "verify_token": "string"
}

Verify email verification code

Verifies the 6-digit code and returns a restricted JWT (60 min TTL). Requires Bearer token from /auth/code/send. Returned token usage: signup (/signup/v2 platform=4 token), OTP login (/login/v2 platform=5 token), or password reset (OTP login then /auth/password).

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

6-digit verification code

code
required
string

6-digit verification code

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/auth/code/verify

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "123456"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "token": "string"
}

Change password

Verifies old password and changes to a new one. If old_password is empty, force updates without verification. new_password: 8-20 characters, must contain both letters and numbers.

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

old password and new password

new_password
required
string <password>

new password (8-20 chars, must contain letters and numbers)

old_password
string <password>

current password; if empty, skips verification

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/auth/password

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "new_password": "654321",
  • "old_password": "123456"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Verify current password

Verifies if the given password matches the user's current password.

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

current password

password
required
string <password>

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/auth/password/verify

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "password": "123456"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

business_cards

Get business cards

Get social business cards. If user_id is not provided, returns the caller's cards.

Authorizations:
None
query Parameters
user_id
string
type
string
Enum: "hire" "social"
Example: type=social

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/business_cards

  • 400
  • 401
  • 500

    • "gender": "Male",
    • "id": "string",
    • "nickname": "string",
    • "position": "string",
    • "real_name": "string",
    • "type": "hire",
    • "year_of_experience": 0
    }
]

None
path Parameters
chat_id

integer

Send message

Send a new message to a chat

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
chat_id
required
string

Chat ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Message content

medias
Array of strings
message
string
reply_message_id
string
type
integer (github_com_cyoyu_apen-api_models.MessageType)
Enum: 0 1 2 3 4

0=MsgText (plain text), 1=MsgImage (image), 2=MsgAudio (audio/voice), 3=MsgVideo (video), 4=MsgMatch (social-card match event)

url
string

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/chats/v2/{chat_id}/messages

Content type
application/json

feeds

Get feeds

Get paginated feeds for user

Authorizations:
None
query Parameters
category
string
Enum: "Medical" "Coronavirus" "Gossip" "Play" "Business" "Money" "Job" "Recruit" "RecruitTesting" "Child" "Emotion" "Trade" "Dating" "Girl" "Boy" "Politics" "Photography" "Testing" "OnePiece" "Student" "StudentGossip" "StudentMedical" "StudentDating" "StudentTrade" "StudentPlay" "StudentIntern"
section
integer
Enum: 0 1 2
next
string
count
integer
Example: count=20
collaboration_types
string
Example: collaboration_types=0,1

[Recruit] Collaboration types filter

departments
string
Example: departments=Internal_medicine,Surgery

[Recruit] Departments filter

positions
string
Example: positions=VS,Resident,PGY

[Recruit] Positions filter

work_locations
string
Example: work_locations=新北市,台中市

[Recruit] Work locations filter

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/feeds/v1

  • 400
  • 500

None
path Parameters
feed_id
required

position
required
integer [ 0 .. 19 ]
type

string

None
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Feed position creation

feed_id
required
string
feed_type
required
string
Enum: "post" "posts" "banners" "chat"
policies
required
Array of strings
position
required
integer [ 0 .. 19 ]

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/feeds/v1/positions

Remove a follower

Removes a follower by their user ID. Updates the follow action to unfollowed if the given user is indeed following the current user.

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

User ID of the follower to remove

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/followers/{user_id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Accept a follow request

Accepts a pending follow request from the given user. Updates the follow action from pending to followed.

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

User ID of the requester to accept

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/followers/{user_id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "relationship": {
    • "followers_status": "pending",
    • "following_status": "followed"
    }
}

None
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

application/json

Follow a user

Sends a follow request to a user. The follow action is set to followed or pending based on the target user's follow setting.

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
user_id
required
string

User ID to follow

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/following/{user_id}

  • 400
  • 401
  • 500

application/json

    • "following_status": "followed"
    }
}

Create a new chat

This API creates a new hire chat between sender and receiver. Provide either "resume" (full resume flow) or business card fields "real_name"/"position"/"departments" (chat-first flow), but not both.

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

new chat parameters

object (models.BusinessCardContent)
post_id
required
string
object (github_com_cyoyu_apen-api_models.ResumeContent)

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/chats

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "business_card": {
    • "current_job_title": "string",
    • "current_organization": "string",
    • "departments": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "position": "string",
    • "real_name": "string"
    },
  • "post_id": "string",
  • "resume": {
    • "alma_mater": {
      • "custom_value": "哈佛大學 哈佛醫學院",
      • "key": "Other"
      },
    • "available_start_date": "2025-07-01",
    • "collaboration_types": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "contact_times": [
      • {
        • "day_of_week": "星期一",
        • "end_time": "18:00",
        • "start_time": "09:00"
        }
      ],
    • "custom_specialty": "血液科",
    • "departments": [
      • "[Obstetrics_and_gynecology]"
      ],
    • "email": "test@example.com",
    • "expected_salary": "月薪50萬",
    • "expertise": "血液科",
    • "gender": "Male",
    • "phone_number": "0912345678",
    • "position": "PGY,Resident,VS",
    • "preferred_locations": [
      • "[臺北市",
      • "新北市",
      • "桃園市]"
      ],
    • "real_name": "王小明",
    • "special_requirement": "",
    • "year_of_graduation": "2020"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "chat_id": "string"
}

Update a hire chat

Update hire_contact on a chat room. Only the post author (recruiter) can update.

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
chat_id
required
string

ID of a chat thread

Request Body schema: application/json
required

update chat parameters

required
object (models.HireContact)

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/chats/{chat_id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "hire_contact": {
    • "email": "string",
    • "line_account_id": "string",
    • "phone": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "details": {
    • "property1": null,
    • "property2": null
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "request_id": "string"
}

Fetch new messages of a hire chat thread

This API returns new messages (later than a specified message)

Authorizations:
Bearer
path Parameters
chat_id
required
string
Example: 8306778b-7287-f72b-6b26-a95316de96e4

ID of a chat thread

query Parameters
last_message_id
required
string
Example: last_message_id=afac0d2b-1541-4c32-8d61-d9222659cfda

get all new messages that come later than this one

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/chats/{chat_id}/fetch

Send a message in a hire chat

This API supports sending messages in a hire chat thread

Authorizations:
Bearer
path Parameters
chat_id
required
string

ID of a chat thread

Request Body schema: application/json
required

send message parameters

media_ids
Array of strings
reply_to_message_id
string
text
string
type
required
integer
Enum: 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/chats/{chat_id}/messages

Content type
application/json

}

Bearer
path Parameters
chat_id
required

required

pin chat parameters

Agree to hire eula

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

agreement record

version_agreed
required
string non-empty

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/eula

Upload medias

This API handles uploading media files (image, video) from clients

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
required
file
required
string <binary>

file content, max size: 10 MBytes

filename
string

filename of this file, leave it blank if you don't want to specify

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/media

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 422
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "media_id": "string"
}

This API will mark a message as "unsent"

Authorizations:
Bearer
path Parameters
message_id
required
string

ID of a chat message

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/hire/messages/{message_id}/unsend

application/json

users

Log in a user (v2)

Authenticate a user and return user data with a session token. Login with invitation (type=0 only) will update user profile from invitation data and auto-approve.

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Login credentials

email
string

required for platform 4 only

object

optional; login only supports type=0 (admin invite)

password
string

required for platform 4 only

platform
integer
Enum: 0 1 2 3 4 5

0=Facebook, 1=Apple, 2=Google, 3=Line, 4=Email/Password, 5=OTP

token
string

platform 0~3: OAuth token; platform 5: restricted JWT from /auth/code/verify; not needed for platform 4

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/login/v2

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "invitation": {
    • "code": "string",
    • "deeplink": "string",
    • "type": 0
    },
  • "password": "string",
  • "platform": 0,
  • "token": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{

    }

Sign up a new user (v2)

Register a new user account with platform authentication and optional invitation. Both real_id and license_url are required for identity verification (skipped for Apple reviewers).

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Signup details

gender
string

Male or Female

object

optional invitation

is_vendor
boolean

true if vendor account

license_url
string

license image URL; if provided, triggers async OCR to extract name/department/position

name
string

display name

password
string

required for platform 4 only; 8-20 chars, must contain both letters and numbers

platform
integer
Enum: 0 1 2 3 4 5

0=Facebook, 1=Apple, 2=Google, 3=Line, 4=Email/Password

real_id
string

medical/professional ID; required

token
required
string

platform 0~3: OAuth token; platform 4: restricted JWT from /auth/code/verify

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/signup/v2

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "gender": "Male",
  • "invitation": {
    • "code": "string",
    • "deeplink": "string",
    • "type": 0
    },
  • "is_vendor": true,
  • "license_url": "string",
  • "name": "John",
  • "password": "string",
  • "platform": 0,
  • "real_id": "A123456789",
  • "token": "string"
}

matches

Get matches

Get the matches for the authenticated user. Each match embeds the other participant's card as it was at match time.

Authorizations:
None

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/matches

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
[

      • "department": "string",

      • "type": "hire",
      • "year_of_experience": 0
      },
    • "created_at": 0,
    • "is_read": true,
    • "match_id": "string",
    • "matched_user_id": "string",
    • "user_id": "string"
    }
]

Mark match as read

Mark the given match as read on the caller's side.

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
match_id
required
string

Match ID

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/matches/{match_id}/read

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

me

Delete current user account

Permanently deletes the current user's account. This action anonymizes the user data by appending random strings to identifiers like Facebook ID, Apple ID, Google ID, Line ID, and Real ID, making them unusable for login while preserving data integrity in the system.

Authorizations:
None

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

retrieve the profile information for the currently authenticated user

None

Accept invitation

Accept an invitation by ID

Authorizations:
None
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Invitation details

code
string

type=0: invitation UUID; type=1: referral code string

deeplink
string
type
integer
Enum: 0 1

0=admin invite (auto-approves user), 1=referral code

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/me/invitation

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "deeplink": "string",
  • "type": 0
}

  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Mark notification as read

Marks a specific notification as read for the current user

Authorizations:
None
path Parameters
notif_id
required
string

Notification ID to mark as read

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/me/notifs/{notif_id}/read

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Reset notification badge count

Resets the notification badge count to 0 for the specified filter and section. Note: This only resets the badge count, it does not mark individual notifications as read.

Authorizations:
None
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Badge reset parameters

filter
string
Enum: "all" "normal" "interact" "follow"

filter could be one of [all,normal,interact,follow]

section
integer
Enum: 0 1 2 3 4

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/me/notifs/read_all

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "filter": "interact",
  • "section": 1
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{ }

Get current user's notifications (v2)

Retrieves notifications for the current user with various filtering options including specialty, student, section-based filtering, and pagination support

Authorizations:
None
query Parameters
specialty
boolean

Filter by specialty notifications

student
boolean

Filter by student notifications

before
string

Timestamp for pagination (fetch notifications before this time)

count
integer

Number of notifications to return

filter
string
Default: "all"
Enum: "all" "normal" "interact" "follow"

Notification filter type

section
integer
Enum: 0 1 2 3 4

Notification section type

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/me/notifs/v2

    • 0

      • "start_time": "09:00"
      }

    • "[Obstetrics_and_gynecology]"
    ],

  • "expected_salary": "月薪50萬",
  • "expertise": "血液科",
  • "phone_number": "0912345678",
  • "position": "PGY,Resident,VS",
  • "preferred_locations": [
    • "[臺北市",
    • "新北市",
    • "桃園市]"
    ],
  • "real_name": "王小明",
  • "special_requirement": "",
  • "year_of_graduation": "2020"
}

Update user's resume

Updates the current user's resume information

Authorizations:
None
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Resume information

object (github_com_cyoyu_apen-api_models.AlmaMater)
available_start_date
string non-empty
collaboration_types
Array of integers non-empty
Array of objects (github_com_cyoyu_apen-api_models.ContactTime) [ 1 .. 3 ] items
custom_specialty
string
departments
Array of strings <= 1 items
email
string
expected_salary
string non-empty
expertise
string
phone_number
string
position
string
Enum: "VS" "Resident" "PGY"
preferred_locations
Array of strings <= 5 items
real_name
string non-empty
special_requirement
string
year_of_graduation
string non-empty

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/me/resume

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

Get hot posts v2

Retrieve hot posts with cursor-based pagination

Authorizations:
None
query Parameters
section
required
integer

Post section (0=doctor, 1=student)

next
string

Cursor for pagination

count
integer

Number of posts to return (default 20)

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/posts.hot.v2

  • 400

Content type
application/json

  • "data": null,

query Parameters
label

Get new posts

get a list of new posts with pagination

query Parameters
specialty
boolean

Filter by specialty

student
boolean

Filter by student category

before
integer

Timestamp for pagination (fetch posts before this time)

count
integer

Number of posts to return

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/posts.new

Get a single post

path Parameters
post_id
required
string

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/posts/{post_id}

application/json

  • "apply_status": "APPLIED",

post_id

使用 AI 潤飾文章內容

使用 AI 來改進和潤飾文章的內容。目前僅支援徵才文章。

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

潤飾請求，包含分類和文字內容

category
required
string
Enum: "Medical" "Coronavirus" "Gossip" "Play" "Business" "Money" "Job" "Recruit" "RecruitTesting" "Child" "Emotion" "Trade" "Dating" "Girl" "Boy" "Politics" "Photography" "Testing" "OnePiece" "Student" "StudentGossip" "StudentMedical" "StudentDating" "StudentTrade" "StudentPlay" "StudentIntern"
text
required
string non-empty

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/posts/polish

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "category": "recruit",
  • "text": "We are hiring a senior doctor"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "text": "We are seeking an experienced senior physician to join our team"
}

required

Post content

auth_list
Array of strings

Array of strings

required
string

boolean

Array of strings
facility_tag
Array of strings
object (models.HireContact)

string

boolean

boolean

boolean

boolean
labels
Array of strings

Array of objects

Array of strings

integer

string
tags
Array of strings

string

string <= 50 characters

Save draft

Save post draft (Upsert: create if not exists, update if exists)

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Draft parameters

block_character
Array of integers
category
string
contains_vote
boolean
hire_username
string
is_anonymous
boolean
is_followers_only
boolean
labels
Array of integers
medias
Array of integers
poll_duration
integer
quote
Array of integers
text
string
title
string <= 50 characters
vote_options
Array of integers

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/post_drafts

post-templates

取得使用者自訂範本

取得目前使用者建立的所有自訂範本，可選擇性篩選特定分類

Authorizations:
Bearer
query Parameters
category
string

文章分類（例如：Medical, Job, Recruit）

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/post_templates

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "text": "string",
      • "title": "string"
      }
    ]
}

建立自訂範本

為目前使用者建立新的文章範本（需指定分類）

Authorizations:
Bearer
Request Body schema: application/json
required

範本參數

category
required
string (models.PostCategory)
Enum: "Medical" "Coronavirus" "Gossip" "Play" "Business" "Money" "Job" "Recruit" "RecruitTesting" "Child" "Emotion" "Trade" "Dating" "Girl" "Boy" "Politics" "Photography" "Testing" "OnePiece" "Student" "StudentGossip" "StudentMedical" "StudentDating" "StudentTrade" "StudentPlay" "StudentIntern"
text
required
string non-empty
title
required
string [ 1 .. 30 ] characters

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/post_templates

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "category": "Medical",
  • "text": "string",
  • "title": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "details": {
    • "property1": null,
    • "property2": null
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "request_id": "string"
}

刪除使用者的文章範本（軟刪除，只能刪除自己的範本）

Authorizations:
Bearer
path Parameters
template_id
required
string

範本 ID

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/post_templates/{template_id}

  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "details": {
    • "property1": null,
    • "property2": null
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "request_id": "string"
}

Authorizations:
Bearer
path Parameters
template_id
required
string

範本 ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

更新參數

text
string non-empty
title
string [ 1 .. 30 ] characters

Responses

http://dev.api.apen.penpeer.co/post_templates/{template_id}

application/json

  • "text": "string",

application/json

    • "property1": null,

    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "request_id": "string"
}

Bearer

Patch settings

Updates the current user's settings. Supports partial updates for follow and post settings.

Authorizations:
None
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Settings

object (models.BusinessCardSetting)
object (models.FollowSetting)
object (models.HireSetting)
object (models.PostSetting)

Responses
